title: In Episode 23
wikitext:
[]: In Episode 23'...             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Tue Nov 30, 2010 5:10 pm Right as Eva-00 was about to explode, she suddenly transformed in to something that looked kind of like GNR, except with a halo? Can anyone explain (or at least theorize) what that was? Perhaps Unit-00's true form under the armor, or the part of Rei's soul in Eva-00 being released?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 30, 2010 5:21 pm Well, first of all that scene is one of the DC and there are those who don't like those addictions at all... Rei even changed the aspect of Lilith when she merged with her (and she even changed it again in Kaworu), she seems to be able to manipulate freely LWM bodies. Maybe she merged with the 00 (and the soul of Rei-I) before exploding and she gave it her aspect. But I'm only theorizing, I'm not sure about it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 30, 2010 5:22 pm Before that even happened, the angel manifested itself in Rei's form as it reached out to Shinji in Unit 01. As a corruption type angel, it somehow managed to assume her form for its own purposes. Unfortunately, enough of the internal mechanics remained intact for the unit to explode.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 30, 2010 5:26 pm We have Rei (body and soul) 00's souls and Adamic material (Armisael body and soul), so we've got a fair bit of the makings of an EoE style Giant Naked Rei. Related http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=259

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Tue Nov 30, 2010 5:57 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Well, first of all that scene is one of the DC and there are those who don't like those addictions at all...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 30, 2010 6:14 pm AshPhoenix wrote: Does the fact that it's DC make it a lower level of canon?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Nov 30, 2010 7:06 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: I don't think so and actually I consider them more canonical but there are some who think that they're less canonical, I remember that it's been discussed in the past.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Tue Nov 30, 2010 9:00 pm thewayneiac wrote: Those like me who think that EoTV and EOE show two different versions of the same events believe that the D.C, have totally replaced the O.A.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Dec 01, 2010 12:17 pm The Halo above the head suggest that it's Armisael(Who appeaed as a halo/ring and already made several attempts at shapeshifting into Rei), having Fully merged with Rei/Unit 00 just before it blew up.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Dec 02, 2010 10:13 am Kendrix wrote: The Halo above the head suggest that it's Armisael(Who appeaed as a halo/ring and already made several attempts at shapeshifting into Rei), having Fully merged with Rei/Unit 00 just before it blew up.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Dec 02, 2010 10:51 am I don't know, if they were merged Armisael was completely part of the hybrid and he wouldn't need to appear as an halo (without mentioning that after NME I don't notice halos anymore but that's a different story). Surely it's possible that it could have gone down to Terminal Dogma but actually angels like Leliel, Arael and Armisael that were more interested in mankind than reaching Lilith always left me a little perplex if their main purpose wasn't just to study mankind. Of course it's also possible that it was an elaborated strategy to get rid of EVAs before reaching Adam/Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Dec 02, 2010 4:33 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Surely it's possible that it could have gone down to Terminal Dogma but actually angels like Leliel, Arael and Armisael that were more interested in mankind than reaching Lilith always left me a little perplex if their main purpose wasn't just to study mankind.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Dec 02, 2010 4:41 pm So in the end, Armisael fulfilled his goal before he was blown to bits.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Dec 02, 2010 4:47 pm AshPhoenix wrote: So in the end, Armisael fulfilled his goal before he was blown to bits.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Dec 02, 2010 6:18 pm thewayneiac wrote: Rather than less canonical, the argument among some people is that the original versions are canon to EoTV, while the D.C. are canon to EOE. These are largely the same people who think that the endings are divergent rather than complimentary.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Dec 02, 2010 6:25 pm NemZ wrote: One addendum though, we believe they are complimentary where the message to the audience is concerned (in the "two sides of the same coin" sense), just not with regards to maintaining a single coherent narrative.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Dec 02, 2010 6:26 pm NemZ wrote: Well and fairly stated. One addendum though, we believe they are complimentary where the message to the audience is concerned (in the "two sides of the same coin" sense), just not with regards to maintaining a single coherent narrative.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Dec 02, 2010 6:33 pm I wasn't really intending to start a whole 'thing' here... Simply put: EoTV = the only thing holding you back is yourself, so get over it already and join the party. EoE = While you wallow in self pity the rest of the world isn't waiting on you, so you'd better hurry if you want anyone to still be around when you show up.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Dec 02, 2010 6:37 pm Azathoth wrote: it tries to reach out to something else with an S2 engine and a PWM body in complete confusion, pushing Rei over the edge.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Dec 02, 2010 6:55 pm AshPhoenix wrote: Didn't Rei (II) see a flash of Gendo right before Eva-00 exploded, though? Maybe that's what she reached out for.
summary:
[]: In Episode 23'...             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Tue Nov 30, 2010 5:10 pm Right as Eva-00 was about to explode, she suddenly transformed in to something that looked kind of like GNR, except with a halo? Can anyone explain (or at least theorize) what that was? Perhaps Unit-00's true form under the armor, or the part of Rei's soul in Eva-00 being released?

[]:          &nbsp
